old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-8m8p","title":"Bound application chunks by full SCHC packet","description":"Transport spec applies the 1281-byte mandatory receiver capacity to application chunks, but the limit covers the complete SCHC packet including compressed headers and CoAP metadata. Specify payload budget after overhead.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:32:34.551668744Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-21T02:32:34.551668744Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-8m8p","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-7fqg.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:32:34.63751636Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Bounded SCHC datagram size to 1281 bytes in FragmentSender (Rust/Python) and schc_fragmenter_init (C). Updated constants, added validation, extended tests. Cargo test, clippy, ruff, Python pytest all pass. Vectors covered by roundtrip tests.
